proposition: Petr Faraga (b. 1966) was a co-founder of Able.cz s.r.o. (then BIT CONSULTING s.r.o.): a founding 1/3 shareholder from 3 Oct 2012 and a jednatel from 3 Oct 2012 until 13 Oct 2020. He exited ownership in stages by 2020 and re-entered on 29 July 2025 with 0.50 % — the same restructuring in which Vít Schlesinger, Ondřej Kaman, Jakub Kaman, Radek Juhaňák and Tomáš Kořenský were registered as shareholders.

statusExplanation: Přímo doloženo primárním/oficiálním zdrojem (např. přímý výpis rejstříku nebo zakládaná listina).
note: Replaces the 'newly identified minor shareholder' framing: he is a co-founder with an eight-year officer history, which the mirrors did not surface.
